title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone (7-Point)

notes.text: Hook: Harry lives an unloved ordinary life with the Dursleys, unaware of his true identity.
Plot Turn 1: Harry enters Hogwarts and crosses into the wizarding world.
Pinch Point 1: Early dangers and Snape suspicion signal an active threat around the Stone.
Midpoint: Harry decides to pursue the truth with Ron and Hermione, not remain passive.
Pinch Point 2: Stakes sharpen as they realize someone is about to steal the Stone.
Plot Turn 2: Harry confronts Quirrell/Voldemort and is forced into direct conflict.
Resolution: Harry protects the Stone, survives, and returns changed to a life with belonging and purpose.
